title: rootless: fix stop and rm when the container is running with uid != 0
body:
we cannot join a new namespace when we want to stop or rm a container that is running with an uid != 0, as that will prevent us to send any signal to the process.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/2577

comments.body: LGTM aside from documentation issues @rhatdan brought up
one small optimization, LGTM either way

I really hate the current limitation of 1 pod|container at a time in this PR, rootless mode must not have any CLI differences.  Working on a new version without that limitation
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #2603) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
dropped the limitation for just 1 pod/container.  Tests are green
